<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <phpunit backupGlobals="false" backupStaticAttributes="false" bootstrap="tests/bootstrap.php" colors="true" convertErrorsToExceptions="true" convertNoticesToExceptions="true" convertWarningsToExceptions="true" processIsolation="false" stopOnFailure="false" syntaxCheck="false" > <testsuites> <testsuite name="Package Test Suite"> <directory suffix=".php">./tests/</directory> </testsuite> </testsuites> </phpunit>
